usage_rule: Use these terms naturally when helpful. Guardian validates restricted terms and factual notes.

Williamsburg.definition: Primary neighborhood for the business in Brooklyn.
Williamsburg.usage: Use local specificity only when it serves the point.

Greenpoint.definition: Nearby neighborhood and likely service/SEO target.
Greenpoint.usage: Use when discussing local reach, routines, or neighborhood pages.

GPS tracking.definition: Walk verification and route visibility used as a trust signal.
GPS tracking.guardian_note: Do not mention live tracking, screenshots, or app features unless Scout surfaced them.

Free in-home consultation.guardian_note: Do not imply same-day availability or guaranteed booking from consultation alone.

No pack walks.definition: Operational differentiator emphasizing safer, more controlled walks.
No pack walks.guardian_note: Do not turn this into a blanket attack on other walkers.

Senior visit.definition: Shorter visit format for older or special-needs dogs.
Senior visit.guardian_note: Avoid medical claims or treatment language.

Solo walk + light training.definition: Higher-touch service for dogs needing extra structure.
Solo walk + light training.guardian_note: Do not imply certified behavioral treatment or formal training credentials unless sourced.

heat advisory.definition: A high-heat condition that can change safe walk timing, route choice, and paw safety considerations.
heat advisory.usage: Use when flagging weather-driven schedule or safety recommendations in a brief.
heat advisory.guardian_note: Only mention specific temperatures or forecast details when sourced from current weather data.

salt season.definition: Winter period when salted sidewalks increase paw irritation risk.
salt season.usage: Use in seasonal content or route-planning advice during cold months.

shoulder hours.definition: Earlier morning and later evening windows that are safer during extreme heat or cold.
shoulder hours.usage: Use when recommending walk timing adjustments.

dog-related holidays.definition: Dog or pet calendar moments that can become content hooks when they align with the current date.
dog-related holidays.guardian_note: Only reference holidays that are verified for the current date or an upcoming known date.

platform competitors.definition: Gig-economy pet care marketplaces such as Rover and Wag.
platform competitors.guardian_note: Use the Anti-Platform Without Ranting pillar. Never present stale pricing or metrics as current.

local competitors.definition: NYC dog walking businesses like Swifto, POOCHi, and Happy Pants NYC that compete for overlapping demand.
local competitors.guardian_note: Only cite current competitor details when supported by live sourcing.

insured and bonded.definition: Coverage status was not verified in the source research.
insured and bonded.guardian_rule: Do not publish this claim unless it is confirmed and added to the knowledge base.

veterinarian approved.definition: Medical endorsement claim not verified in research.

24/7 availability.definition: Always-on service promise not supported by current research.
